productName: Northwest CCELL® FULL SPEC Ceramic Cart - 1g - Jet Fuel Gelato [ H ]
description: A convenient hybrid cartridge carrying Jet Fuel Gelato's character into flavorful, on-demand vapor — discreet, simple, and ready to go. Smooth, discreet, and flavorful — with notes of ammonia, violet, and flowery, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
